channel.title: amaaov.github.io
channel.description: amaaov public page: explore my values and commitments, work-time topics, and after-work interests. Join me in problem-solving, engineering, and creative performances.

item.title: О модальности кручения
item.description: Ограничения и трансформации сайтсвопа при применении к гибким реквизитам. Борис Фонтанов, 2025.

item.title: Manifesto for Collaborative Concurrent Extreme Software and Product Development for humans
item.description: Observed practices and philosophy for human readers: understanding, concurrency, visibility, workshop craft, and collective capability in software development.

item.title: Люди с приколом
item.description: Новелла-эссе о границе между живым контактом и системами, которые заменяют доверие проверкой. Уг, костёр, двор, движуха, работа, медиа и прикол.

item.title: Juggling
item.description: Juggling as continuous presence of a state without holding.

item.title: Past Year Review 24/25
item.description: Past Year Review 24/25: A reflective essay on work culture, productivity simulation, and authentic contribution. A meditation on moving from performance to presence in modern work environments.

item.title: Stay X Fresh lyrics
item.description: Stay X Fresh lyrics collection: punk and hardcore songs written by Sasha in 2008-2010, performed with Artem. Raw, aggressive lyrics about society, freedom, and resistance.

item.title: 2024 okaupunki lyrics
item.description: 2024 okaupunki lyrics collection: original ideas processed through GPT and Suno sound generator. Explore juggling-inspired poetry, multilingual verses, and experimental music concepts.

item.title: Suno Multitrack Player
item.description: Multi-track audio player for Suno-generated music with individual track controls and waveform visualization. Features Russian songs with separate vocal, drum, bass, and synth tracks.
